name: Stuffed Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 cups frozen vegetables (zucchini, carrots, cauliflower, lima beans, and Italian beans)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut tomatoes in half. Spoon out pulp, leaving a 1/4 inch thick shell. Reserve tomato pulp; discard seeds.
2. Chop the tomato pulp.
3. Set shells and pulp aside.
4. In a small saucepan, cook frozen vegetables according to package directions. Drain.
5. Stir in chopped tomato pulp.
6. Spoon 1/8 of the veggie mixture into each tomato shell.
7. Place tomatoes in a 10x6x2 inch baking dish. Sprinkle with grated cheese and pepper.
8. Bake in a 350°F oven for 15-20 minutes or until heated through.
Per serving: 53 calories, 3 g protein, 9 g carbohydrates, 1 g fat, 4 mg cholesterol, 63 mg sodium, 255 mg potassium.
